title: Better Creatures
description: If you want a new adventure with creatures never seen before download this mod and enjoy yourself.
body: If you want a new adventure with creatures never seen before download this mod and enjoy yourself.   You will see in this mod : Creatures: \-Gray Alien \-Cyclop \-Duckman \-Dwarf \-Leprechaun \-Elf \-Ghost \-Goblin \-Shaman Goblin \-Easter Bunny \-Hippo \-Entelodonte \-Flamingo \-Koala \-Lion \-Lobster \-Owl \-Platypus \-Vampire \-Werewolf \-Pigeon Chimmera \-Draflygh \-Kappa \-Ammit (Egiptian Mithology) \-Saci (Brazilian Folcklore) \-Headless Mule (Brazilian Folcklore) \-Curupira (Brazilian Folcklore) \-Fresno Alien \-Chickenman \-Double Head Cassowary \-Hocelodon \-Jungle Native \-Giant Japig   And other mobs that you discovered playing   New Ores: \-Sugilite \-Benitoite \-Sugitoite (A blend of Benitoite and Sugilite)   If you have any suggestions for the mod, leave it in the comments. I will be reading all the suggestions   So far this is it, I hope you like it. Any bug let me know.    If have you do a review of this mod please tell me, i will love see it and put here.
